projects.name: cordum
projects.description: Cordum (cordum.io) is a platform-only control plane for autonomous AI Agents and external workers. It uses NATS for the bus, Redis for state and payload pointers, and CAP v2 wire contracts for jobs, results, and heartbeats. Workers and product packs live outside this repo.Core cordum
